Vendored emu2212
================

This directory contains the MIT-licensed `emu2212` SCC/SCC+ emulator by
Mitsutaka Okazaki, vendored from:

https://github.com/digital-sound-antiques/emu2212

Vendored commit: `ce7ade109942d9ba1b8067a27af47ddf37795fd7`

Chipper uses this core for the Konami SCC-inspired partial register-level
engine. See `THIRD_PARTY_NOTICES.md` for license and product-accuracy notes.
